mapper.select: select kb.id as id, kb.wh_id as whId, kb.category as category, kb.user_id as userId, kb.kb_auth as kbAuth, kb.wh_auth as whAuth, case when user.real_name is not null then user.real_name when dept.name is not null then dept.name else groupb.name end as userName, kb.status as status from kb_warehouse_auth kb left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.user_id left join castle_sys_dept dept on dept.id = kb.user_id left join kb_groups groupb on groupb.id = kb.user_id where kb.is_deleted = 2 and wh_id = #{wid}
mapper.delete: delete from kb_warehouse_auth where wh_id = #{whId} and category in(00,02)
delete from kb_warehouse_auth where wh_id = #{whId} and category in(01)
mapper.select: select kb.id as id, kb.wh_id as whId, kb.category as category, kb.user_id as userId, kb.kb_auth as kbAuth, kb.wh_auth as whAuth, case when user.real_name is not null then user.real_name when dept.name is not null then dept.name else gr.name end as userName, kb.status, kb.sort from kb_warehouse_auth kb left join (select * from castle_sys_user where is_deleted = 2) user on user.id = kb.user_id left join (select * from castle_sys_dept where is_deleted = 2) dept on dept.id = kb.user_id left join (select * from kb_groups where is_deleted = 2) gr on gr.id = kb.user_id where kb.is_deleted = 2 and wh_id = #{swId} and kb.category =#{category} having userName is not null order by kb.sort

select kb.* from kb_warehouse_auth kb left join (select * from castle_sys_user where is_deleted = 2) user on user.id = kb.user_id left join (select dept.id, user.id uid,dept.parents from castle_sys_dept dept join castle_sys_user user on user.dept_id = dept.id) dept on (dept.id = kb.user_id or dept.parents like concat('%',kb.user_id,'%')) left join (select * from kb_groups_user) gr on gr.group_id = kb.user_id join kb_subject_warehouse sw on sw.id = kb.wh_id where kb.is_deleted = 2 and sw.status=2 and sw.is_deleted=2 and kb.category = #{category} and (kb.user_id =#{uid} or gr.user_id=#{uid} or dept.uid=#{uid}) order by kb.sort
